---
title: "Thesis Figures"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(gt)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)
library(Cairo)

df <- load_new_logs_multi("phase2_logs/multi/")
df_single <- load_new_logs_single("phase2_logs/single/")
old_df <- load_old_logs("phase1_logs/")

old_df <- old_df %>%
  mutate(
    total_latency_ms = total_latency_us / 1000,
    inference_ms     = inference_us / 1000,
    network_ms       = network_latency_us / 1000,
    fps_numeric      = as.integer(str_extract(filename, "\\d+(?=fps)")),
    model_label = recode(model_name,
      yolov5n = "YOLOv5n",
      yolov5s = "YOLOv5s",
      yolov5m = "YOLOv5m"
    ),
    mode = case_when(
      str_detect(filename, "LocalOnly") ~ "Local",
      str_detect(filename, "Offload")   ~ "Offload",
      TRUE ~ experiment_mode
    ),
    model_label = factor(model_label, levels = c("YOLOv5n", "YOLOv5s", "YOLOv5m")),
    fps_numeric = factor(fps_numeric, levels = c(1, 5, 10, 15))
  )

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    total_latency_ms = total_latency_us / 1000,
    queue_wait_ms    = zp_queueing_us / 1000,
    inference_ms     = inference_time_us / 1000,
    network_ms       = network_latency_us / 1000,
    rsu_overhead_ms  = rsu_overhead_us / 1000,
    zp_processing_ms = zp_processing_us / 1000,
    fps_numeric = as.integer(str_extract(filename, "\\d+(?=fps)")),
    model_label = recode(model_name,
      yolov5n = "YOLOv5n",
      yolov5s = "YOLOv5s",
      yolov5m = "YOLOv5m"
    ),
    codec_label = recode(codec,
      JpgLossy    = "JPEG",
      WebpLossy   = "WebP",
      PngLossless = "PNG"
    ),
    tier_label = recode(tier,
      T1 = "Best",
      T2 = "Default",
      T3 = "Fast"
    ),
    resolution = factor(resolution, levels = c("Letterbox", "HD", "FHD")),
    model_label = factor(model_label, levels = c("YOLOv5n", "YOLOv5s", "YOLOv5m")),
    fps_numeric = factor(fps_numeric, levels = c(1, 5, 10, 15))
  )

df_single <- df_single %>%
  mutate(
    total_latency_ms = total_latency_us / 1000,
    queue_wait_ms    = zp_queueing_us / 1000,
    inference_ms     = inference_time_us / 1000,
    network_ms       = network_latency_us / 1000,
    rsu_overhead_ms  = rsu_overhead_us / 1000,
    zp_processing_ms = zp_processing_us / 1000,
    fps_numeric = as.integer(str_extract(filename, "\\d+(?=fps)")),
    model_label = recode(model_name,
      yolov5n = "YOLOv5n",
      yolov5s = "YOLOv5s",
      yolov5m = "YOLOv5m"
    ),
    codec_label = recode(codec,
      JpgLossy    = "JPEG",
      WebpLossy   = "WebP",
      PngLossless = "PNG"
    ),
    tier_label = recode(tier,
      T1 = "Best",
      T2 = "Default",
      T3 = "Fast"
    ),
    resolution = factor(resolution, levels = c("Letterbox", "HD", "FHD")),
    model_label = factor(model_label, levels = c("YOLOv5n", "YOLOv5s", "YOLOv5m")),
    fps_numeric = factor(fps_numeric, levels = c(1, 5, 10, 15))
  )

base_theme <- theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle    = element_text(size = 12, color = "gray40"),
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    legend.position  = "bottom",
    axis.title       = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank() 
  )

model_colors <- c(
  "YOLOv5n" = "#3498db", 
  "YOLOv5s" = "#f39c12",
  "YOLOv5m" = "#e74c3c"
)

mode_colors <- c(
  "Local"   = "#2c3e50",
  "Offload" = "#27ae60" 
)

component_colors <- c(
  "Inference"     = "#27ae60",
  "Queue Wait"    = "#e74c3c",
  "Network"       = "#f39c12",
  "RSU Overhead"  = "#3498db"
)

rsu_colors <- c(
  "RSU-0000" = "#3498db",
  "RSU-0001" = "#f39c12",
  "RSU-0002" = "#e74c3c"
)

if (!dir.exists("figures")) dir.create("figures")

save_figure <- function(plot, name, width = 16, height = 10) {
  ggsave(file.path("figures", paste0(name, ".pdf")), plot,
    width = width, height = height, units = "cm", device = cairo_pdf)
  ggsave(file.path("figures", paste0(name, ".png")), plot,
    width = width, height = height, units = "cm", dpi = 300)
}

df %>%
  group_by(mode) %>%
  summarise(
    na_controller = sum(is.na(controller_received)),
    latency_exceeded = mean(total_latency_us > (1000000 / as.integer(str_extract(filename, "\\d+(?=fps)"))), na.rm = TRUE)
  )

```

```{r figA-dfr-phase1}
# Figure A — Phase 1 DFR Local + Offload (Section 6.1)
# Replaces Figures 5 & 6 from the prior publication.
# Hardware: Raspberry Pi RSU, NVIDIA Jetson Nano ZP (GPU), 1:1 architecture.

dfr_phase1 <- old_df %>%
  group_by(mode, model_label, fps_numeric) %>%
  summarise(
    received_frames = n(),
    expected_frames = 600 * as.integer(as.character(first(fps_numeric))),
    dfr = (1 - received_frames / expected_frames) * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

dfr_local <- dfr_phase1 %>% filter(mode == "Local")

figA_local <- ggplot(dfr_local,
    aes(x = fps_numeric, y = dfr, fill = model_label)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = sprintf("%.0f%%", dfr)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    vjust = -0.4, size = 2.5
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = model_colors, name = "Model") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 105),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")
  ) +
  labs(
    title   = "Phase 1: Local Inference (RSU)",
    subtitle = "JPEG, FHD",
    x       = "Target Frame Rate (FPS)",
    y       = "Dropped Frame Rate (%)",
  ) +
  base_theme

save_figure(figA_local, "phase1_dfr_local") 

dfr_offload <- dfr_phase1 %>% filter(mode == "Offload")

figA_offload <- ggplot(dfr_offload,
    aes(x = fps_numeric, y = dfr, fill = model_label)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = sprintf("%.0f%%", dfr)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    vjust = -0.4, size = 2.5
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = model_colors, name = "Model") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 105),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")
  ) +
  labs(
    title   = "Phase 1: Offloaded Inference (ZP)",
    subtitle = "JPEG, FHD",
    x       = "Target Frame Rate (FPS)",
    y       = "Dropped Frame Rate (%)",
  ) +
  base_theme

save_figure(figA_offload, "phase1_dfr_offload")

# To display them in your notebook/document sequentially:
figA_local
figA_offload
```

```{r fig1-dfr}

dfr_data <- df %>%
  filter(codec == "JpgLossy", resolution == "Letterbox", tier == "T1") %>%
  group_by(mode, model_label, fps_numeric) %>%
  summarise(
    received_frames = n(),
    expected_frames = 60 * as.integer(as.character(first(fps_numeric))) * 3,
    dfr = pmax(0, (1 - received_frames / expected_frames) * 100),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
dfr_data_single <- df_single %>%
  group_by(mode, model_label, fps_numeric) %>%
  summarise(
    received_frames = n(),
    expected_frames = 60 * as.integer(as.character(first(fps_numeric))),
    dfr = pmax(0, (1 - received_frames / expected_frames) * 100),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
dfr_local_phase2 <- dfr_data %>% filter(mode == "Local")
fig1_local <- ggplot(dfr_local_phase2,
    aes(x = fps_numeric, y = dfr, fill = model_label)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = sprintf("%.0f%%", dfr)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    vjust = -0.4, size = 2.5
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = model_colors, name = "Model") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 105),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Phase 2: Local Inference (RSU)",
    subtitle = "JPEG, Letterbox, Best quality (T1)",
    x        = "Target Frame Rate (FPS)",
    y        = "Dropped Frame Rate (%)"
  ) +
  base_theme
save_figure(fig1_local, "phase2_dfr_local")

dfr_offload_phase2_multi <- dfr_data %>% filter(mode == "Offload")
fig1_offload_multi <- ggplot(dfr_offload_phase2_multi,
    aes(x = fps_numeric, y = dfr, fill = model_label)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = sprintf("%.0f%%", dfr)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    vjust = -0.4, size = 2.5
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = model_colors, name = "Model") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 105),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Phase 2: Offloaded Inference (1:k with k=3)",
    subtitle = "JPEG, Letterbox, Best quality (T1)",
    x        = "Target Frame Rate (FPS)",
    y        = "Dropped Frame Rate (%)"
  ) +
  base_theme
save_figure(fig1_offload_multi, "phase2_dfr_offload_multi")

dfr_offload_phase2_single <- dfr_data_single
fig1_offload_single <- ggplot(dfr_offload_phase2_single,
    aes(x = fps_numeric, y = dfr, fill = model_label)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = sprintf("%.0f%%", dfr)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    vjust = -0.4, size = 2.5
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = model_colors, name = "Model") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 105),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Phase 2: Offloaded Inference (1:k with k=1)",
    subtitle = "JPEG, Letterbox, Best quality (T1)",
    x        = "Target Frame Rate (FPS)",
    y        = "Dropped Frame Rate (%)"
  ) +
  base_theme
save_figure(fig1_offload_single, "phase2_dfr_offload_single")

dfr_offload_combined <- bind_rows(
  dfr_offload_phase2_multi  %>% mutate(ratio = "k = 3"),
  dfr_offload_phase2_single %>% mutate(ratio = "k = 1")
) %>%
  mutate(ratio = factor(ratio, levels = c("k = 1", "k = 3")))
fig1_offload_combined <- ggplot(dfr_offload_combined,
    aes(x = fps_numeric, y = dfr, fill = model_label)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = sprintf("%.0f%%", dfr)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    vjust = -0.4, size = 2.5
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ ratio, ncol = 2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = model_colors, name = "Model") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 105),
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Phase 2: Offloaded Inference",
    subtitle = "1:k with k=1 vs k=3 | JPEG, Letterbox, Best quality (T1)",
    x        = "Target Frame Rate (FPS)",
    y        = "Dropped Frame Rate (%)"
  ) +
  base_theme
save_figure(fig1_offload_combined, "phase2_dfr_offload_combined")

fig1_local
fig1_offload_multi
fig1_offload_single
fig1_offload_combined

```

```{r fig2-codec-table}
# Figure 2 — Codec Median Latency Table (Section 6.3)

codec_data <- df %>%
  filter(
    mode       == "Offload",
    model_name == "yolov5n",
    fps_numeric == 5,
    resolution == "Letterbox"
  ) %>%
  group_by(codec_label) %>%
  summarise(
    median_latency_ms   = median(total_latency_ms),
    iqr_ms              = IQR(total_latency_ms),
    median_network_ms   = median(network_ms, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_inference_ms = median(inference_ms),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(median_latency_ms)

fig2_table <- codec_data %>%
  gt() %>%
  cols_label(
    codec_label         = "Codec",
    median_latency_ms   = "Median E2E Latency (ms)",
    iqr_ms              = "IQR (ms)",
    median_network_ms   = "Median Network (ms)",
    median_inference_ms = "Median Inference (ms)"
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns  = where(is.numeric),
    decimals = 1
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note(
    "Filtered to: Offload mode, YOLOv5n, 5 FPS, Letterbox resolution"
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_fill(color = "#FFEBEE"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = codec_label == "PNG")
  )

gtsave(fig2_table, file.path("figures", "phase2_codec_table.png"))
fig2_table
```

```{r fig3-frontier}
# Figure 3 — Efficiency Frontier (Section 6.3)

frontier_data <- df %>%
  filter(mode == "Offload") %>%
  group_by(model_label, resolution) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_detections    = mean(detection_count),
    median_latency_ms = median(total_latency_ms),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

p_left <- ggplot(frontier_data,
    aes(x = resolution, y = avg_detections, fill = model_label)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = model_colors, name = "Model") +
  labs(
    title    = "Detection Sensitivity",
    subtitle = "Average objects detected per frame",
    x = "Resolution",
    y = "Avg Detections"
  ) +
  base_theme

p_right <- ggplot(frontier_data,
    aes(x = avg_detections, y = median_latency_ms,
        color = model_label, shape = resolution)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = model_colors, name = "Model") +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c(Letterbox = 16, HD = 17, FHD = 15),
    name   = "Resolution"
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Efficiency Frontier",
    subtitle = "Is the latency cost (Y) justified by more detections (X)?",
    x = "Avg Detections",
    y = "Median Total Latency (ms)"
  ) +
  base_theme

fig3 <- p_left + p_right +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

#save_figure(fig3, "fig3_efficiency_frontier", width = 16, height = 9)
fig3
```

```{r fig4-decomposition}
# Figure 4 — Latency Budget Decomposition (Section 6.4)


offload_only <- df %>%
  filter(mode == "Offload") %>%
  select(model_label, resolution, fps_numeric, rsu_overhead_ms, network_ms, queue_wait_ms, inference_ms) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(rsu_overhead_ms, network_ms, queue_wait_ms, inference_ms),
    names_to = "component",
    values_to = "time_ms"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    component = factor(component, 
      levels = c("inference_ms", "queue_wait_ms", "network_ms", "rsu_overhead_ms"),
      labels = c("Inference", "Queue Wait", "Network", "RSU Overhead"))
  )

latency_budget <- offload_only %>%
  group_by(model_label, resolution, fps_numeric, component) %>%
  summarise(mean_time = mean(time_ms, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

fig4 <- ggplot(latency_budget, aes(x = fps_numeric, y = mean_time, fill = component)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack", width = 0.7) +
  facet_grid(resolution ~ model_label) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Inference" = "#27ae60",
    "Queue Wait" = "#e74c3c", 
    "Network" = "#f39c12",
    "RSU Overhead" = "#3498db"
  )) +
  labs(
    title = "Latency Budget Decomposition (Offload Mode)",
    subtitle = "Green = useful compute | Red = congestion | Orange = network | Blue = capture/encode",
    x = "Target FPS",
    y = "Time (ms)",
    fill = "Component"
  ) +
  base_theme

#save_figure(fig4, "fig4_latency_decomposition", width = 16, height = 12)
fig4

```

```{r fig5-heatmap}
# Figure 5 — Decision Matrix Heatmap (Section 6.5)

heatmap_data <- df %>%
  group_by(model_label, fps_numeric, mode) %>%
  summarise(median_latency_ms = median(total_latency_ms), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = mode, values_from = median_latency_ms) %>%
  mutate(offload_advantage_ms = Local - Offload)

# Sanity check: flag negative cells
if (any(heatmap_data$offload_advantage_ms < 0, na.rm = TRUE)) {
  warning("Negative offload advantage detected — check data!")
}

fig5_heatmap <- ggplot(heatmap_data,
    aes(x = fps_numeric, y = model_label, fill = offload_advantage_ms)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = sprintf("%d ms", round(offload_advantage_ms))),
    fontface = "bold", size = 3.5
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low  = "#C8E6C9",
    high = "#1B5E20",
    name = "Offload Advantage (ms)"
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev) +
  labs(
    x = "Target Frame Rate (FPS)",
    y = "Model Variant"
  ) +
  base_theme +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank()
  )

#save_figure(fig5_heatmap, "fig5_decision_matrix", width = 14, height = 7)
fig5_heatmap
```

```{r fig7-saturation}
# Figure 7 — Zone Processor Saturation Levels (Section 6.6)

saturation_data <- df %>%
  filter(mode == "Offload") %>%
  mutate(aggregate_fps = as.numeric(as.character(fps_numeric)) * 3) %>%
  group_by(model_label, resolution, aggregate_fps) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_queue_wait_ms = mean(queue_wait_ms),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

fig7_sat <- ggplot(saturation_data,
    aes(x = aggregate_fps, y = mean_queue_wait_ms, color = model_label)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = 18,
    linetype   = "dashed",
    color      = "grey40",
    linewidth  = 0.5
  ) +
  annotate("text",
    x     = 19,
    y     = max(saturation_data$mean_queue_wait_ms, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.9,
    label = "Saturation\n(18 FPS)",
    color = "grey40", size = 3, hjust = 0
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ resolution, nrow = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = model_colors, name = "Model") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(3, 15, 30, 45)) +
  labs(
    x = "Aggregate FPS (3 RSUs combined)",
    y = expression("Mean Queue Wait " * T[w] * " (ms)")
  ) +
  base_theme

#save_figure(fig7_sat, "fig7_saturation", width = 16, height = 7)
fig7_sat
```
